title: monticalia libertatis
intro_study: According to "Plants (Basel, Switzerland)", Monticalia libertatis may have benefits related to weed control in agriculture due to its potential use as a natural herbicide.
side_effects: Monticalia libertatis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in individuals with sensitivities. Prolonged use can lead to stomach problems, including nausea, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, improper use of Monticalia libertatis can cause cardiovascular issues, including hypertension and palpitations. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as diabetes or high blood pressure, may experience exacerbated symptoms when using this plant without proper guidance.
